justification: Output is valid JSON with no markdown fences. business_rules array has 8 entries (≥5), each with id and rule fields. acceptance_criteria array has 7 entries (≥5), each with given/when/then fields. edge_cases array has 5 entries (≥2). confidence object has numeric level field (92). All rubric pass criteria met.

observations.text: All 8 business rules are domain-specific to passbar segment rendering, not generic platitudes
Includes required null handling rule (BR-4) and zero-total behavior rule (BR-2)
Acceptance criteria cover all required cases: mixed counts (AC-1), all-fail (AC-3), all-zero (AC-2), all-pass (AC-4), and null counts (AC-5)
Edge cases are non-obvious and practical (negative values, extremely skewed distributions, very large counts)
Includes invariant flags and justifications on business rules, exceeding minimum requirements
Output includes bonus sections (business_impact, escalations, rejection_reasons) beyond what was required
